_comment: project-coord/1.0 negative cases — every case MUST be rejected when validator runs in profile-aware mode for project-coord/1.0.

cases.name: delta-unsorted
cases.reason: delta MUST be sorted by (op, id) ascending; 'modify' < 'remove' alphabetically but order shows reversed

cases.name: status-unsorted
cases.reason: status MUST be sorted by metric ascending

cases.name: risk-sev-desc-violated
cases.reason: risk MUST sort by sev descending; here med precedes high

cases.name: gates-unsorted
cases.reason: gates MUST sort by (scope, invariant) — 'US-858' before 'CI' violates

cases.name: inventory-unsorted-kvs
cases.reason: KVs within an inventory item MUST be sorted by k ascending

cases.name: decision-unsorted-keys
cases.reason: decision MUST sort by key ascending
